title: Irish-Style Poached Eggs with Parmigiano-Reggiano Toast
description: A rich and comforting lacto-vegetarian-friendly brunch dish featuring poached eggs on toasted bread topped with a silky Parmigiano-Reggiano sauce.
instructions: Toast the bread until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Poach the egg-yolks in boiling water until cooked through, about 3-4 minutes per yolk.
In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes.
Add the dry white wine to the saucepan and cook until the liquid is almost completely reduced, about 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook until the sauce simmers and slightly thickens, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese until melted and smooth.
Season the sauce with salt to taste.
To assemble, place a toasted bread slice on a plate, top with a poached egg-yolk, and spoon some Parmigiano-Reggiano sauce over the top. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
